items.title: NetApp Stock Rides Rising AI Tide; Shares Popped 70% In The Last 5 Months
items.description: NetApp is gaining traction amid the artificial intelligence tech boom.  Shares of San Jose, Calif.-based NetApp are on track for a sixth straight week of higher closes.  NetApp makes integrated network storage and data management equipment for corporations and government agencies.

items.title: Top 19 Companies Leading the Middle East Cybersecurity Market in 2025 and Beyond | Middle East CyberSecurity Company Evaluation Report, 2025
items.description: The Middle East CyberSecurity Companies Quadrant presents an in-depth analysis of the global cybersecurity market with a focus on the Middle East. It identifies key players and trends, offering insights into technological advancements and product innovations. Out of 100+ companies, the Top 19 are recognized as quadrant leaders, including Palo Alto Networks, IBM, and Cisco. items.title: IBM vs. QCOM: Which Tech Stock Deserves a Spot in Your Portfolio Now?
items.description: IBM holds a competitive edge over Qualcomm with steadier cash flow, SaaS-driven growth and a more attractive valuation.

items.title: Maureen Power Sweeny Joins the Exceptional Women Alliance (EWA)
items.description: The Exceptional Women Alliance (EWA) is proud to welcome Maureen Power Sweeny, Chief Revenue Officer at RapidScale (a Cox Business company), into its prestigious organization of accomplished, influential women leaders. With more than 40 years of leadership experience as a global C-suite executive and business advisor, Maureen brings unparalleled expertise in revenue growth, operational excellence, and large-scale transformation across technology, cloud, and services industries.
